outside_date_extensions.condition: if all conditions except HSR Act or other Regulatory Law conditions are satisfied or waived
outside_date_extensions.note: The outside date automatically extends from July 30, 2026 to October 30, 2026 if all closing conditions other than those related to the HSR Act or other Regulatory Law have been satisfied or waived.

outside_date_extensions.condition: if all conditions in Article VII are satisfied but closing would occur after the outside date
outside_date_extensions.note: The outside date also automatically extends to a specified date if all conditions in Article VII are satisfied but the closing would otherwise occur after the outside date.

static_events.label: Outside Date (Ext. 1)
static_events.note: The outside date automatically extends from July 30, 2026 to October 30, 2026 if all closing conditions other than those related to the HSR Act or other Regulatory Law have been satisfied or waived.

static_events.label: Outside Date (Ext. 2)
static_events.note: The outside date also automatically extends to a specified date if all conditions in Article VII are satisfied but the closing would otherwise occur after the outside date.

downstream.label: HSR Waiting Period Expires
downstream.rule: +30 calendar days after HSR filed (statutory — HSR Act, not stated in merger agreement)

downstream.label: SEC Proxy Review Period
downstream.rule: Open-ended — SEC review (typically 10 business days for preliminary proxy)

downstream.label: Proxy Mailed to Shareholders
downstream.rule: After SEC clearance — typically ≥20 calendar days before meeting

downstream.label: SEC Review Window Opens
downstream.rule: Open-ended — SEC review period (not stated in merger agreement)

downstream.label: Closing
downstream.rule: +5 Business Days after all conditions satisfied / waived
